en_title: Stalker 2 Turned a Profit Before It Came Out Thanks to Money Microsoft Paid for Xbox Exclusivity
cn_title: 微软XBOX独占费让《潜行者2》发售前盈利
subtitle: 微软提前买单

paragraphs.en: The founder of Stalker 2 developer GSC Game World has said the game turned a profit before it even came out thanks to the money Microsoft paid for Xbox exclusivity.
paragraphs.cn: 《潜行者2》开发商GSC Game World创始人表示，得益于微软为XBOX独占支付的费用，游戏甚至在发售前就已经盈利。

paragraphs.en: In an interview with YouTuber OLDboi , GSC Game World founder Sergiy Grygorovych said that Microsoft was so impressed by the number of views the debut Stalker 2 trailer received, that it soon got in touch with the Ukraine company to negotiate terms for exclusivity.
paragraphs.cn: GSC Game World创始人Sergiy Grygorovych接受YouTube博主OLDboi采访时表示，《潜行者2》首支预告片的观看量给微软留下了深刻印象，后者很快联系这家乌克兰公司，商谈独占条款。

paragraphs.en: “We took more than the cost of Stalker 2,” Grygorovych, who has since left GSC Game World to make a new game with a new studio, said. “It paid for itself before the first day.” IGN has asked GSC Game World for comment.
paragraphs.cn: 已经离开GSC Game World、正通过新工作室开发新游戏的Grygorovych说：「我们拿到的钱超过了《潜行者2》的成本。游戏在发售首日之前就已经回本。」IGN已联系GSC Game World寻求置评。

paragraphs.en: Xbox was heavily involved with Stalker 2, which was made amid Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine. It snapped up timed console exclusivity and a day-one launch on Xbox Game Pass, while also helping to produce and market the game, as well as a making-of documentary.
paragraphs.cn: 《潜行者2》在俄罗斯全面入侵乌克兰期间开发，XBOX深度参与其中。微软取得该作主机限时独占权，并让它首日加入XBOX Game Pass；同时还协助制作和营销游戏，以及一部幕后纪录片。

paragraphs.en: After a series of understandable delays, Stalker 2 launched on PC and Xbox Series X and S in November 2024, as well as on Game Pass. It was released on PlayStation 5 a year later, in November 2025. Stalker 2 was originally due out much earlier, in Q4 2021, as per documents revealed in 2021.
paragraphs.cn: 经过一系列情有可原的延期，《潜行者2》于2024年11月登陆PC、XBOX Series和Game Pass，一年后的2025年11月登陆PlayStation 5。2021年曝光的文件显示，游戏原计划早得多、于2021年第四季度推出。

paragraphs.en: Stalker 2 was a sales success, hitting 1 million copies in two days. It has so far surpassed 6 million players. Cost of Hope, the first major story expansion for Stalker 2, launched in the summer.
paragraphs.cn: 《潜行者2》取得商业成功，两天内销量达到100万份，迄今玩家数已超过600万。该作首个大型剧情扩展包《Cost of Hope》已于今年夏季推出。

paragraphs.en: Grygorovych did not say how much money Microsoft paid for the exclusivity, nor how much Stalker 2 cost to develop. But his comments do shine a light on Microsoft’s gaming philosophy when it was building up its content portfolio to help boost interest in Game Pass.
paragraphs.cn: Grygorovych没有透露微软为独占支付了多少费用，也没有公布《潜行者2》的开发成本。不过，他的说法确实让外界得以一窥微软当年扩充内容阵容、提升Game Pass吸引力时所采取的游戏业务理念。

paragraphs.en: Indeed, developers have over the years praised Microsoft for cutting generous deals for Game Pass and exclusivity, with some saying they helped reduce risk and keep studios afloat.
paragraphs.cn: 事实上，多年来不少开发者称赞微软为Game Pass和独占协议开出优厚条件，有些人表示，这些交易帮助他们降低风险，也让工作室得以维持运营。

paragraphs.en: Now, amid new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma’s “reset” of Microsoft’s gaming business, the future of Game Pass is unclear. Microsoft cut 1,600 staff from Xbox earlier this month, with another 1,600 to go this financial year. Sharma has pulled Call of Duty out of Game Pass as a day-one launch title, and is doubling down on Xbox’s biggest franchises, such as Fallout. Four studios are confirmed to be leaving Microsoft ownership, with another on its way. Sharma has called it the most “significant” restructure in Xbox history, insisting Microsoft’s gaming business “is not healthy.”
paragraphs.cn: 如今，随着XBOX新任首席执行官Asha Sharma「重置」微软游戏业务，Game Pass的未来并不明朗。本月早些时候，微软已从XBOX裁员1,600人，本财年还将再裁1,600人。Sharma取消了《使命召唤》首日加入Game Pass的安排，并加倍投入《辐射》等XBOX最大型系列。已有4家工作室确认脱离微软，另有一家也即将离开。Sharma称这是XBOX历史上最「重大」的重组，并坚称微软游戏业务「并不健康」。

paragraphs.en: Speaking on MinnMax , Mike Brown, who was creative director on the hugely successful Forza Horizon 5 before leaving developer Playground to found his own studio, Maverick Games, which is set to release an open world racer of his own called Clutch, said this week that Game Pass had failed to hit enough subscribers to justify Microsoft’s huge spending on content acquisition . This includes the eye-watering $69 billion Microsoft splashed out on Call of Duty developer Activision Blizzard.
paragraphs.cn: Mike Brown曾担任大获成功的《极限竞速：地平线5》创意总监，离开开发商Playground后创办Maverick Games，目前正开发开放世界竞速游戏《Clutch》。他本周在MinnMax节目中表示，Game Pass没能获得足够多订阅用户，无法证明微软为收购内容投入巨资是合理的，其中包括微软收购《使命召唤》开发商动视暴雪时花费的惊人690亿美元(约合人民币4671亿元)（原文69 billion美元，约合人民币4,671亿元）。

paragraphs.en: “I think it's really sad and I think it's really, really unfortunate,” Brown began. “They've honestly invested a fortune in the concept of Game Pass as a service, which led to loads of teams being acquired, loads of games being funded, loads of people getting jobs, all with a vision of getting regular games landing in this service for players. I think the reality is not enough people have subscribed to it at the prices that they needed to pay in order to make that business viable.
paragraphs.cn: Brown首先说道：「我觉得这真的很悲哀，也真的非常不幸。坦率说，他们在Game Pass服务这一概念上投入了巨额资金，因此收购了许多团队、资助了许多游戏，也创造了许多工作岗位，愿景是让玩家定期在这项服务中获得游戏。我认为现实是，愿意以维持这项业务所需价格订阅的人并不够多。

paragraphs.en: “And, that’s actually just really sad. Because we're now going to see studios getting shut down or spun off, and loads of people are going to lose their jobs, and that is honestly just a result of a well-meaning, player-focused concept of Xbox Game Pass not quite landing.”
paragraphs.cn: 「这真的非常令人难过。因为我们现在会看到工作室关闭或被剥离，大量人员会失去工作；说实话，这正是一个出发点良好、以玩家为中心的XBOX Game Pass概念没能真正成功所造成的结果。」

paragraphs.en: Brown went on to defend Microsoft and Game Pass, praising the concept of the subscription service and the games that would otherwise not have been made were it not to have existed.
paragraphs.cn: Brown随后为微软和Game Pass辩护，称赞订阅服务的理念，以及那些如果没有Game Pass便可能不会诞生的游戏。

paragraphs.en: “It’s just a real shame,” he continued. “And as much as people point fingers and call different people within Xbox the villain of the piece, the concept of Game Pass was good. Like, it's a good idea. Let's have a subscription, make it affordable, try and get games to more people. We'll have a really diverse selection of games on there. We'll get a load of studios involved. We'll make some games that probably couldn't exist otherwise. And if more people had subscribed, that makes enough money and it works, and all of those studios go on and those games get made again and those teams will make other games. Unfortunately, it didn’t.
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「这实在太遗憾了。尽管人们指责不同的人，把XBOX内部某些人称作这件事的反派，但Game Pass的概念本身是好的。这是个好主意：推出订阅，让它价格实惠，努力把游戏带给更多人；提供非常多样的游戏阵容，让许多工作室参与，制作一些原本可能无法存在的游戏。如果有更多人订阅，它就能赚到足够的钱、让模式运转下去，所有这些工作室都能继续运营，这些游戏也能再做下去，团队还能制作其他游戏。遗憾的是，事实并非如此。

paragraphs.en: “I don’t know the number it needed to hit was, but it never reached the number that would make a $70 billion acquisition of Activision Blizzard make financial sense. It’s really unfortunate. We don’t know what the future is just yet, but it is a reshaping of the business around that, after the first concept didn’t quite land.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我不知道它需要达到多少用户，但它从未达到足以让700亿美元(约合人民币4739亿元)（原文70 billion美元）收购动视暴雪在财务上合理的数字。这非常不幸。我们还不知道未来究竟如何，但最初的概念未能真正成功后，业务正围绕这一现实重新塑形。」

summary: GSC Game World创始人Sergiy Grygorovych称，微软支付的XBOX限时独占费用超过《潜行者2》的开发成本，使游戏发售前便已回本；具体金额并未公开。
opus_summary: GSC Game World创始人称，微软为《潜行者2》支付的XBOX独占费用超过游戏开发成本。该作因此发售前就已盈利，也折射出微软当年以高额交易扩充Game Pass内容的策略。
